news-global-econ.title: Novartis sells $11 billion bonds to fund avidity acquisition
news-global-econ.description: In October, Novartis agreed to acquire Avidity to enhance its focus on innovative drugs in heart, kidney, metabolic, immunology, neuroscience, and oncology

news-global-econ.description: Scott Bessent challenged CNBC’s framing of global oil shortages, arguing markets remain supplied despite disruptions tied to the Iran conflict.

news-global-econ.title: TSA officers skip work as paychecks stop during shutdown, airports face chaos nationwide
news-global-econ.description: TSA officers miss paychecks during government shutdown, leading to 10% call-out rates nationwide and massive airport security delays across the country.
